episodes.summary: Margaret fought hard for her vision of jalapeño corn dog bites all week, pushing back on overthinking until the team trusted her instincts. She finally relaxed when Steph validated her approach, letting go of perfectionism to embrace the beautiful mess.
episodes.key_moment: She finally relaxed when Steph validated her approach, letting go of perfectionism to embrace the beautiful mess.

episodes.summary: Margaret spent her week perfecting jalapeño corn dog bites with Marcus, wrestling with timing and temperatures. She initially dismissed his concerns about capsaicin separation, but his restraint in the final recipe proved her wrong.
episodes.key_moment: She initially dismissed his concerns about capsaicin separation, but his restraint in the final recipe proved her wrong.
